title: Smart Chat Background
description: Makes the chat background fit each message to its longest line, with configurable padding and optional blur
body:
# 💬 Smart Chat Background

📘 **Smart Chat Background** makes the Minecraft chat cleaner and easier to read. The mod adds a smart message background option to the chat settings: the background automatically adjusts to the length of each chat line, and a separate slider lets you customize the right-side padding.

It also includes a **blurred chat background** with adjustable blur strength from 1 to 10. The blur is applied only within the chat message area and respects the smart background width.

The mod is fully client-side and does not need to be installed on the server.

## ✏️ Features
- Smart message background
- Customizable right-side background padding
- Blurred chat background
- Adjustable blur strength
- Russian and English localization
- Fabric support

### Smart Background Option
![Demo of Smart Background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b55c733d0235aa6915ba147e2737cd7261acadc1.png)

### Blured Background Option
![Demo of Blured Background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/330d165ded4203c1d62276789c2d787a7cd3ea8d.png)
